case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. ANDRZEJ FEDORCZUCK ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDORCZUCK, ANDRZEJ $11,205.37 PRINCIPAL, $654.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,859.37, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200008443)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-28-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
